match.userMessage:
Subtle handheld eye-level camera holds a steady intimate frame with gentle micro-movements as hands lift the coral lipstick tube from its box. Fingers trace the matte surface slowly before gliding color smoothly across the lips. A single blot follows, then lips part into a gentle smile while warm window light shifts softly across the vanity.

[SCARLETT, soft reflective]: "One shade. One summer."

Ambient sounds: quiet coastal studio with soft natural room tone and faint distant waves. subtle lipstick tube handling, lip application glide, single soft blot.
